headline: SpaceX's Nasdaq Debut Puts Bitcoin On 25% Of 'Mag8' Balance Sheets, Strategy’s Michael Saylor Says
summary: FTSE Russell confirmed SpaceX will join the Russell 1000 and Russell Top 200 on June 26, with MSCI adding it to its standard and large-cap indexes on June 29.

raw.headline: SpaceX's Nasdaq Debut Puts Bitcoin On 25% Of 'Mag8' Balance Sheets, Strategy’s Michael Saylor Says
raw.summary: FTSE Russell confirmed SpaceX will join the Russell 1000 and Russell Top 200 on June 26, with MSCI adding it to its standard and large-cap indexes on June 29.

headline: Cathie Wood Goes All-In On SpaceX Debut, Dumps Rocket Lab Stock The Same Day
summary: ARK doubled down on SpaceX while cutting its Rocket Lab position, a stock SpaceX's own S-1 names as a direct competitor.

raw.headline: Cathie Wood Goes All-In On SpaceX Debut, Dumps Rocket Lab Stock The Same Day
raw.summary: ARK doubled down on SpaceX while cutting its Rocket Lab position, a stock SpaceX's own S-1 names as a direct competitor.

headline: From 10% chance of success to $2 trillion market cap: SpaceX's historic IPO
summary: After its Nasdaq debut on Friday, SpaceX was the sixth most-valuable U.S. company, despite being a fraction the size by revenue of tech's megacaps.
